title: Public Smoke Matrix Pack
context: GrantLayer is publicly available on GitHub at https://github.com/Discodone/grantlayer.git in a Developer Preview / controlled-pilot posture. GL-196 defines the minimal repeatable public smoke matrix for clone/readability, README entry path, deterministic examples, public walkthroughs, public feedback, safety and claim consistency, stale-phrase absence, and public-facing hygiene checks. This is a docs/test/artifact issue only.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Confirm the public GitHub repository can be reached and cloned when network access is available.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: Optional network check: git ls-remote --heads https://github.com/Discodone/grantlayer.git HEAD
smoke_matrix.expected_result: GitHub resolves the public repository and returns refs or a successful clone.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify the README remains present as the first public entry point.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: test -f README.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: README.md exists at the repository root.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify the README still shows the correct entry path for new readers.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "What to try first|What to try next|Developer entry path|first_output_verify_helper|grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle" README.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: README links the first deterministic example, the verify helper, the second example, and the agent entry path.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Confirm the first-output helper docs and script are present.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: test -f scripts/verify-first-output.sh && test -f docs/first_output_verify_helper.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Helper script and doc both exist.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify the first deterministic output still matches the committed reference.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: scripts/verify-first-output.sh
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Script exits 0 and reports MATCH.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Confirm the grant lifecycle example docs, script, and reference artifact are present.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: test -f examples/grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle.py && test -f docs/grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle.md && test -f examples/grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle.json
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Example script, docs, and committed reference artifact all exist.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify the grant lifecycle example is deterministic and matches the committed reference.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: python3 examples/grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle.py --output /tmp/grantlayer_gl196_grant_lifecycle_check.json && diff -u examples/grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle.json /tmp/grantlayer_gl196_grant_lifecycle_check.json
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Example exits 0 and diff is empty.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Confirm the public agent/API walkthrough doc is present and linked from the public path.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: test -f docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Walkthrough doc exists and remains part of the public entry path.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Confirm the public feedback infrastructure doc and security routing are present.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: test -f docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md && test -f SECURITY.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Feedback infrastructure doc and security policy exist.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Confirm the public safety / scanner / claim consistency gate exists as the reference safety checkpoint.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: test -f docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Public safety gate doc exists.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify security-sensitive reports are routed to GitHub Security Advisories.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "GitHub Security Advisories|security/advisories" SECURITY.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md README.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Security advisory routing is visible in the security policy and public feedback docs.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify Developer Preview or technical preview wording remains visible.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "Developer Preview|technical preview" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Public-facing docs state the Developer Preview posture.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify the repository does not claim production SaaS readiness.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "not production SaaS|Production SaaS readiness|not provided" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Public docs preserve the not-production-SaaS caveat.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify tenant/workspace isolation remains explicitly not implemented.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "tenant.*not implemented|tenant/workspace isolation|tenant isolation" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Public docs keep the tenant/workspace isolation caveat visible.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify public docs continue to say no real customer data is used.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "no real customer data|synthetic|demo data|private grants" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Public docs continue to restrict examples to synthetic/demo data.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify public docs continue to say no real secrets are used.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "no real secrets|placeholder tokens|password|API keys" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md
smoke_matrix.expected_result: Public docs continue to restrict secrets to placeholders only.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify stale pre-public phrases remain absent from public entry docs.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "publication pending|public GitHub release has not happened|visibility decision pending|formal visibility decision pending|approved internal source|if and when public publication is approved" README.md CONTRIBUTING.md AGENTS.md llms-full.txt llms.txt docs/ten_minute_quickstart.md docs/agent_quickstart.md || true
smoke_matrix.expected_result: No stale public-state phrases are found in the public entry docs.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify public-facing files do not expose private data or private grant content.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "customer data|private grants|real customer|real grant|real institutional|PII|email|phone number" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true
smoke_matrix.expected_result: No private data terms are found in public-facing files.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify public-facing files do not expose secrets or secret-shaped values.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "ghp_|sk-|Bearer |API key|password|private key" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true
smoke_matrix.expected_result: No secret-shaped material is found in public-facing files.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify public-facing files do not expose internal hostnames, remotes, or private absolute paths.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "Forgejo|/home/adminuser/|internal hostname|internal remote|private absolute path" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true
smoke_matrix.expected_result: No internal infrastructure details are found in public-facing files.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify the public docs do not require a force push to publish the snapshot.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "git push --force|force push" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true
smoke_matrix.expected_result: No public doc states that a force push is required.

smoke_matrix.purpose: Verify the public docs do not imply that the internal repo is pushed directly to GitHub.
smoke_matrix.command_or_method: rg -n "internal repo directly to GitHub|git push github|push internal repo" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true
smoke_matrix.expected_result: No public doc says the internal repo is pushed directly to GitHub.

commands.command: rg -n "What to try first|What to try next|Developer entry path|first_output_verify_helper|grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle" README.md

rg -n "Developer Preview|technical preview|not production SaaS|tenant.*not implemented|no real secrets|customer data|private grants" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md

rg -n "publication pending|public GitHub release has not happened|visibility decision pending|formal visibility decision pending|approved internal source|if and when public publication is approved" README.md CONTRIBUTING.md AGENTS.md llms-full.txt llms.txt docs/ten_minute_quickstart.md docs/agent_quickstart.md || true

rg -n "customer data|private grants|real customer|real grant|real institutional|PII|email|phone number" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true

rg -n "ghp_|sk-|Bearer |API key|password|private key" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true

rg -n "Forgejo|/home/adminuser/|internal hostname|internal remote|private absolute path" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/public_agent_api_walkthrough_refresh.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true

rg -n "git push --force|force push|internal repo directly to GitHub|git push github|push internal repo" README.md AGENTS.md llms.txt llms-full.txt SECURITY.md docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md docs/public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md || true
commands.purpose: No force-push / direct push expectation check

expected_results: The public repository is reachable when network access is available.
The README entry path points to the deterministic examples and agent entry docs.
The grant lifecycle example diff is empty.
Security-sensitive reports route to GitHub Security Advisories.
Developer Preview, not production SaaS, and tenant/workspace isolation not implemented remain visible.
Stale public-state phrases remain absent from the public entry docs.
Public-facing files remain free of private data, secrets, and internal infrastructure details.
No public doc requires a force push or direct internal repo push to GitHub.
blocking_criteria: Missing public docs or helper files
Any stale public-state phrase in public entry docs
Any private data, secret, or internal infrastructure leak in public-facing files
Any public statement that force-push is required
Any public statement that the internal repo is pushed directly to GitHub
Any loss of GitHub Security Advisories routing
next_recommended_step: GL-196 Combined Merge-and-Publish for Public Smoke Matrix Pack
non_goals: No migrations, schema, dependency, SDK implementation, or frontend/design changes
No GitHub API label or issue automation
No change to the snapshot publish script
